title: Incorrect result when using unnamed "?" bindings
key_bug_features: Unnamed "?" bindings cause incorrect query results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, age INTEGER CHECK(age >= 0), email TEXT UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES (?, ?, ?);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, amount REAL, FOREIGN KEY(user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE u.age > ?;
